sanskrit_example_iast: pādamekaṃ hṛdi nyasya itareṇaiva ceṣṭayet . kāntaḥ kroḍe sthitāṃ nārīṃ bandho 'yaṃ ceṣṭako mataḥ ..
pādamekaṃ hṛdi sthāpya dvitīyaṃ skandhasaṃsthitam . stanau dhṛtvā rametkāmī bandhastvekapadaḥ smṛtaḥ ..
nārī pādadvayaṃ dhṛtvā kāntasyoruyugopari . kaṭimāloḍayedāśu bandho 'yaṃ harṣakīlakaḥ ..
nāryāścoruyugaṃ dhṛtvā karābhyāṃ pīḍayetpunaḥ . kāmayennirbhayaḥ kāmī bandho 'yaṃ harṣasaṃpuṭaḥ ..
śṛṅgārabandhaviśeṣaḥ . tasya lakṣaṇam nārī padadvayaṃ sthāpya kāntasyorudvayopari . kaṭiṃ ceddholayedāśu bandhaḥ kandarpaśṛṅkhalaḥ .. iti ratimañjarī .
strījaṅghe caiva saṃpīḍya dorbhyāmāliṅgya sundarīm . kārayet ṣṭhāpanaṃ
strīpādadvayamākṛṣya vimumukṣitaliṅgakaḥ . yoniṃ ca pīḍayetkāmī bandhaḥ kuliśanāyakaḥ ..
pādau dvau skandhayugmasthau kṣiptvā liṅgaṃ bhage laghu . kāmayetkāmukīṃ kāmī bandhaḥ kākapado mataḥ ..
dvau pādau skandhasaṃlagnau kṣiptvā liṅgaṃ bhage tathā . kāmayetkāmukaḥ prītyā bandhaḥ kāmaprado hi saḥ ..
pārśvopari padau kṛtvā yonau liṅgena tāḍayet . bāhubhyāṃ dhāraṇaṃ gāḍhaṃ bandho vai kṣubdhasaṃjñakaḥ ..
bāhubhyāṃ pādayugmābhyāṃ veṣṭayitvā striyaṃ ramet . laghu liṅgatāḍanaṃ
vadati madhuravāṇīṃ dīrghanetro 'tibhīruścapalamatiḥ sudehaḥ śīghravego mṛgo 'yam . — . mṛge tuṣṭā ca citriṇī . — . citriṇīmṛgayoryonimeḍhrakau ca tathāvidhau
hastābhyāṃ ca samāliṅgya nārī padmāsanopari . ramedgāḍhaṃ samākṛṣya bandho 'yaṃ padmasaṃjñakaḥ ..
striyamānatapūrvāṅgīṃ svapādāntaḥ padadvayam . ūrdhvāṃśena rametkāmī bandho 'yaṃ paśupāśakaḥ ..
pātayedūruyugme ca kāmukaṃ yadi kāmukī . ratimitrastadā khyātaḥ kāminīnāṃ sukhāvahaḥ ..
pīḍyedūruyugmena kāmukaṃ kāminī yadā . ratināgaḥ samākhyātaḥ kāminīnāṃ manoramaḥ ..
nārīpadadvayaṃ kāmī dhārayeddhṛdaye yadi . dhṛtakaṇṭho rametkāmī bandhaḥ syādratisundaraḥ ..
yoṣitpādau hṛdi sthāpya karābhyāṃ pīḍayetstanau . yatheṣṭaṃ tāḍayedyoniṃ bandhaḥ samapadaḥ smṛtaḥ ..
saṃprasāryobhayoḥ pādau śayyāgatakapolakaḥ . bhagaliṅgasya saṃyogādramate saṃpuṭo hi saḥ ..
ekapādamūrau kṛtvā dvitīyaṃ skandhasaṃsthitam . nārīṃ kāmayate kāmī bandhaḥ syāduparītakaḥ
pañcakrośāntare yatra na liṅgāntaramīkṣyate . tadekaliṅgamākhyātaṃ tatra siddhiranuttamā ..
na seśe yasya rambate 'ntarā sakathyā3 kapṛt

citation: Journ. of the Am. Or. S. 6,328

sanskrit_example_iast: ā hanti gabhe paso ni galgalīti dhārakā
dudheryuktasya dravataḥ sahānasa ṛcchanti ṣmā niṣpado mudgalānīm
he hate he hatetyevaṃ svāmibhartṛhateti ca
